title: Dipteris lobbiana
taxonomy: Dipteris lobbiana is classified as a species of fern in the genus Dipteris, which belongs to the family Dipteridaceae. The family Dipteridaceae is part of the order Cyatheales, which is a group of tree ferns and other related species. The order Cyatheales is further categorized under the class Polypodiopsida, which is a division of vascular plants. The class Polypodiopsida is also known as the ferns and lycopods. This classification reflects Dipteris lobbiana's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plant species.
